name: Okra Extravaganza
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp dry sherry or rice wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice pineapple in half lengthwise and remove the core. Set aside.
2. Cut pineapple into 1-inch chunks and set aside.
3. In a wok, stir-fry scallions, garlic, ginger, pepper, okra, soy sauce, and dry sherry or rice wine vinegar over high heat until vegetables are tender-crisp, about 4 minutes.
- Add water if vegetables appear to be sticking.
4. Add pineapple chunks, cover, and continue cooking for 3 minutes.
5. Spoon the mixture into the pineapple shells and serve immediately.
